title: Automation based on Time Tracking Column
excerpt: I would like an automation that changes the status of a column based on the time tracking column. For example: When Time Tracking starts the status is “Working.” The inverse automation is already available.

posts.author: Pray59 (Patti Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like an automation that changes the status of a column based on the time tracking column. For example: When Time Tracking starts the status is “Working.” The inverse automation is already available.

posts.author: MistyMK (AppBay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Pray59 there is a new app called Smart Timer and Team Tracking, it is a timer that looks the same as the monday.com native timer but has extra features and reporting.

This has status that are dependent on the timer. So there is “in progress”, “completed”, “paused” and “not stated”. On the timer these status are different colors and listed in the reporting board.

Hope that helps!
